message: You've neglected attention dependency for too long. The market is shifting beneath your model and you weren't watching.
Base margin has been under sustained pressure. Structural erosion is accelerating — recovery costs are compounding.
You've repeatedly pushed process value extraction in the same direction. The model is becoming structurally rigid — pivoting will be expensive.
Aggressive automation investment has created dependency. Rolling back automation now would destabilize operations.
Repeated moves on attention dependency have locked you into a structural position. Reversing course will cost significantly more than it would have earlier.
Multiple structural pressures are converging. The system is entering a stressed state — tradeoffs are sharpening and safe options are narrowing.
The system has entered crisis. Hidden fragility across multiple variables has compounded into structural instability. Every decision now carries existential weight.
Outcome alignment has been neglected. In a delegated economy, models that don't deliver measurable outcomes become invisible to agents.
Structural strain has reached a critical threshold. The business model's hidden weaknesses are now manifesting as visible failures.
